wwilp|Landau's Problemswwigbwwilegwwin2p1wwitp|wwiabc|wwirh

Institutions

Where the Riemann hypothesis research concentrates, three ways

Reading the columns
  • Canonical the headline rank: half current environment, half training record.
  • Training where today's Top 100 earned their PhDs (verified Mathematics Genealogy records; 60 of 100 researchers covered). A dash means no recorded Top 100 alumni.
  • Environment the research gravity around the institution today: every Top 100 researcher contributes by rank and by distance (exponential decay, 100 km scale). A dash means the institution has no verified coordinates yet.
  • Top 100 how many of the current Top 100 work there. Hover a row for names.

All columns are integer ranks; 1 is best. Click any header to sort. Candidates are the union of the Top 100's current institutions and their PhD schools, so pure training grounds appear even when nobody on the list works there today.
